title: 3-in-1 Construction Set - Build Fork Lift Truck, Crane, Low Loader | 170 Metal Pieces with Assembly Tools | Educational Engineering Toy for Kids - R02-0036/s
features: 3-in-1 Building Fun: Create three unique construction vehicles—Forklift, Crane, and Low Loader—using 170 high-quality metal pieces, fostering imaginative play and engineering skills.
Comprehensive Tool Set: Includes all essential assembly tools, making it easy for kids to build their vehicles and learn valuable construction techniques.
Compatible with Other Sets: This construction set is designed to be compatible with other leading brands, allowing for limitless creative possibilities and expansion of play.
STEM Educational Toy: Encourages problem-solving, critical thinking, and fine motor skills, making it an ideal educational gift for budding engineers and creative minds.
Engaging Construction Play: Perfect for children aged 6 and up, this set promotes cooperative play and enhances social skills as kids build and share their creations together.
description: Product description Unleash your child’s inner engineer with our 3-in-1 Construction Set! Featuring 170 durable metal pieces and all the necessary tools, kids can build a Forklift, Crane, and Low Loader. This versatile set encourages imaginative play, supports STEM learning, and is compatible with other construction brands, offering endless creative possibilities. Perfect for children aged 6 and up, it promotes problem-solving skills and cooperative play, making it an excellent gift for aspiring builders! Safety Warning No Applicable
